title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 101.
content:
There was a Young Girl of Majorca,
    Whose aunt was a very fast walker;
    She walked seventy miles,
    And leaped fifteen stiles,
    Which astonished that Girl of Majorca.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 101."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
